acceptance_criteria: Flowchart eval no longer reports labels_missing/labels_extra caused solely by escaped Mermaid HTML-like label markup; add regression coverage based on reference implementation behavior before changing renderer/eval behavior.
closed_reason: Fixed in leverage-on-quality: added FLOW-2.4 eval coverage for raw markup/entities/escape artifacts and normalized flowchart label rendering; flowchart eval no longer reports markup-driven labels_missing/labels_extra.
description: Flowchart eval still reports missing labels where Selkie escapes Mermaid HTML-like label content instead of matching reference text extraction. Examples from /tmp/selkie-flow-subgraph-members-after/selkie-eval-c7b7ea64: channel_flowchart_event_sources expects Vec<Effect> but Selkie emits Vec<Effect>; channel_flowchart_orphan_tracker expects cleanup_orphaned_worktrees limit: Some2 / OrphanTracker::prune&unmerged / Re-tracked with warned_at: None but Selkie emits literal <b> markup.
title: flowchart: normalize HTML labels to match Mermaid text extraction
